title: Northwest Territories Territorial Squash Championships
excerpt: Melina Turk, former Dartmouth Varsity Squash and Calgary Winter Club assistant pro, would like to invite all Edmonton players to consider flying up to the Northwest Territories for the ever popular Territorial Squash Championships. content: Melina Turk, former Dartmouth Varsity Squash and Calgary Winter Club assistant pro, would like to invite all Edmonton players to consider flying up to the Northwest Territories for the ever popular Territorial Squash Championships. The tournament is taking place from Monday May 29th to Sunday June 4th with out-of-town play to begin on Friday June 2nd. There is a heavy emphasis on fun and it affords a great opportunity to explore Canada’s North. I don’t know anyone who’s ever gone to this tournament and not had a great time! The Registration deadline is Tuesday May 23rd. For more information please contact ozzie@ykraquetclub.com.
